title: Beam Weight Calculator
description: Industrial-grade beam weight estimation tool compliant with ISO 9001, Lean Six Sigma, and WERC standards. Calculates theoretical weight, material cost, and hidden loss drivers for steel beams.

inputs.label: Beam Type
inputs.businessContext: Standard structural steel profiles per ASTM A6/A6M.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard structural steel profiles per ASTM A6/A6M.
businessContext_i18n.tr: ASTM A6/A6M'ye göre standart yapısal çelik profiller.
businessContext_i18n.de: Standardprofile aus Baustahl nach ASTM A6/A6M.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Profils standard en acier de construction selon ASTM A6/A6M.
businessContext_i18n.es: Perfiles estructurales de acero estándar según ASTM A6/A6M.
businessContext_i18n.ar: مقاطع فولاذية هيكلية قياسية حسب ASTM A6/A6M.

inputs.label: Material Density
inputs.businessContext: Typical steel density 7850 kg/m³; adjust for alloys (e.g., stainless ~8000).

businessContext_i18n.en: Typical steel density 7850 kg/m³; adjust for alloys (e.g., stainless ~8000).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tipik çelik yoğunluğu 7850 kg/m³; alaşımlar için ayarlayın (örn. paslanmaz ~8000).
businessContext_i18n.de: Typische Stahldichte 7850 kg/m³; für Legierungen anpassen (z. B. Edelstahl ~8000).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Densité typique de l'acier 7850 kg/m³ ; ajuster pour les alliages (ex. inox ~8000).
businessContext_i18n.es: Densidad típica del acero 7850 kg/m³; ajuste para aleaciones (ej., inoxidable ~8000).
businessContext_i18n.ar: كثافة الفولاذ النموذجية 7850 كجم/م³؛ اضبط للسبائك (مثل الفولاذ المقاوم للصدأ ~8000).

inputs.label: Beam Length
inputs.businessContext: Standard stock lengths: 6m, 12m; custom up to 30m.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard stock lengths: 6m, 12m; custom up to 30m.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Standart stok boyları: 6m, 12m; özel sipariş 30m'ye kadar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Standardlängen: 6 m, 12 m; Sonderlängen bis 30 m.

inputs.label: Flange Width
inputs.businessContext: Width of top/bottom flange for I/H-beams.

businessContext_i18n.en: Width of top/bottom flange for I/H-beams.
businessContext_i18n.de: Breite des oberen/unteren Flansches bei I/H-Trägern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Largeur des semelles supérieure/inférieure pour les poutres en I/H.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ancho de las alas superior/inferior para vigas I/H.
Espesor de las placas del ala.

businessContext_i18n.fr: Hauteur libre entre les semelles (profondeur d'âme).
businessContext_i18n.es: Altura libre entre alas (profundidad del alma).

rules.message: Flange width exceeds 2x web height – unusual geometry, verify dimensions.
Web slenderness > 100 – potential buckling risk per AISC 360.
Flange width/thickness > 30 – check local buckling limits.
Length > 12m – special transport and handling required.

thresholds.message: Total weight exceeds 5,000 kg – crane capacity may be insufficient.
Material cost > $10,000 – consider bulk discount or alternative material.
Cutting loss > 5% – review nesting and cutting process (Lean Six Sigma waste reduction).

hiddenLossDrivers: Flange/web thickness variation due to mill tolerances
Length measurement errors from thermal expansion
suggestedActions: Verify actual dimensions with calipers before cutting
Apply material density correction based on mill certificate
